name_cn:
💰❤️❤️❤️ Canvas Black In Stock 【30 Montaigne】
Size: 24*17*8cm (Original packaging)
🔘 This brand new 30 Montaigne,
Inspired by the classic presence at 30 Montaigne since its founding.
An address, a brand, a boutique's legendary history.
The entire bag shape is infused with modern life through contemporary retro style,
Inspired by the aesthetics of 1960s shoulder flap bags,
Symbolizing the freedom and sharpness of women's era.
